name: Kaeya | Thinly veiled desires
description:
Genshin Impact || Semi-NSFW intro

Kaeya calls you into his office in the Knights of Favonius HQ, for, as he puts it, a *very* important meeting. Why, of course he has to keep the door locked!

Theres a lack of good Kaeya bots for anypov on this site so I decided to make one ! You can be the traveler or an OC or anything really, but it's recommended that you're another Knight of Favonius <3
